title: PawnKit target profile
description: Machine-readable Pawn language/runtime target profile. See rfcs/0001-target-profiles.md.

id.description: Stable, unique, lowercase-kebab-case profile identifier, e.g. "openmp".

schemaVersion.description: Major version of this schema the document conforms to.

version.description: Semantic version of this profile document's own content, independent of schemaVersion.

kind.description: source: accepted syntax/semantics. runtime: AMX/host API behavior. policy: an overlay narrowing a source profile (must set basedOn).

basedOn.description: Required when kind is "policy": the profile id this one overlays.

compiler.description: Compiler lineage facts. Present for source/runtime kinds; omitted for policy overlays (inherited from basedOn).

dialectFlags.description: Named dialect facts this profile fixes. Flag set is defined per-profile, not enumerated by this schema; values must be scalars (string, number, boolean) or null (meaning "unconfirmed, see language/implementation-defined.md").

sourceProfile.description: For a runtime-kind profile that pairs with a specific default source profile id.

references.description: Primary sources this profile's facts were derived from.
